subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
$Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out. I’d be glad to explore this further. I’m available on 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, and 2026-04-23, each between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. If one of those windows works for you, send over a preferred time and I’ll do my best to confirm it.

I’m not able to share internal contact directory details, but I can help coordinate directly from here.

Best,
Agent
